name: Pear Relish
recipeIngredient: 12 pounds hard pears, about 40 - peeled, cored, and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. Run the pears, onions, and peppers through a food grinder.
2. Drain off all liquid.
3. Combine vinegar, sugar, salt, pickling spice, and turmeric in a large pot.
4. Bring to a boil and maintain for 10 minutes.
5. Add the pear, onion, and pepper pieces to the boiling mixture.
6. Maintain a boil for an additional 15 minutes.
7. Spoon the hot relish into sterilized jars and seal quickly.
This is very good with meats or vegetables.
Yield: 8 or 9 pints.
